document_metadata.title: Darkwood Guide and Walkthrough
document_metadata.author: orgulo
document_metadata.description: Complete walkthrough and reference guide for Darkwood. Covers game controls, the skill system, status effects, weapons, enemies, hideout defense, and full campaign progression through the Prologue, Chapter 1 (Dry Meadow, Silent Forest, Old Woods), Chapter 2 (The Swamp), and all endings.
areas_covered: Epilogue (Bliss and Burn Them All Endings)
